languages.text: "Вытянула жребий. Отправилась искать воду и лекарства для братьев и сестер моих, но нашла нечто большее — вас! Возможно..." {n}Женщина задумывается и начинает беспокойно раскачиваться на месте.{/n} "...то провидение Его? Я должна отвести вас, да... В убежище! Старейшины. Они все расскажут. Нужно лишь показать вам путь..."

traits.locale_text: "Вытянула жребий. Отправилась искать воду и лекарства для братьев и сестер моих, но нашла нечто большее — вас! Возможно..." {n}Женщина задумывается и начинает беспокойно раскачиваться на месте.{/n} "...то провидение Его? Я должна отвести вас, да... В убежище! Старейшины. Они все расскажут. Нужно лишь показать вам путь..."
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

traits.locale_text: "Вытянула жребий. Отправилась искать воду и лекарства для братьев и сестер моих, но нашла нечто большее — вас! Возможно..." {n}Женщина задумывается и начинает беспокойно раскачиваться на месте.{/n} "...то провидение Его? Я должна отвести вас, да... В убежище! Старейшины. Они все расскажут. Нужно лишь показать вам путь..."
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

languages.text: "I drew the short straw. Went to look for water and medicine for brothers and sisters of mine, but found more — found you! Perhaps..." {n}The woman turns pensive and starts uncomfortably swaying from side to side.{/n} "...such was His divine will? I must take you, yes... Take you to the shelter! The elders. They will explain everything. I just have to show you the way..."
languages.original_text: "Вытянула жребий. Отправилась искать воду и лекарства для братьев и сестер моих, но нашла нечто большее — вас! Возможно..." {n}Женщина задумывается и начинает беспокойно раскачиваться на месте.{/n} "...то провидение Его? Я должна отвести вас, да... В убежище! Старейшины. Они все расскажут. Нужно лишь показать вам путь..."

traits.locale_text: "I drew the short straw. Went to look for water and medicine for brothers and sisters of mine. On the way back Nightmares picked up my scent. I had to run into the unknown. Perhaps...". {n}The woman turns pensive and starts swaying from side to side.{/n} "...such was His divine will? I must take you, yes... Take you to the shelter! The elders. They will explain everything. I just have to find the way..."
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

traits.locale_text: "I drew the short straw. Went to look for water and medicine for brothers and sisters of mine. On the way back Nightmares picked up my scent. I had to run into the unknown. Perhaps...". {n}The woman turns pensive and starts swaying from side to side.{/n} "...such was His divine will? I must take you, yes... Take you to the shelter! The elders. They will explain everything. I just have to find the way..."
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

traits.locale_text: "I drew the short straw. Went to look for water and medicine for brothers and sisters of mine, but found more — found you! Perhaps..." {n}The woman turns pensive and starts uncomfortably swaying from side to side.{/n} "...such was His divine will? I must take you, yes... Take you to the shelter! The elders. They will explain everything. I just have to show you the way..."
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

languages.text: "Ich habe den kurzen Strohhalm gezogen. Ich suchte Wasser und Medizin für meine Brüder und Schwestern, aber ich fand mehr — ich fand dich! Vielleicht..." {n}Die Frau wird nachdenklich und beginnt unruhig hin und her zu schwanken.{/n} "...war das sein göttlicher Wille? Ich muss dich mitnehmen, ja... Dich in den Schutzraum bringen! Zu den Ältesten. Sie werden dir alles erklären. Ich muss dir nur den Weg zeigen..."
languages.original_text: "I drew the short straw. Went to look for water and medicine for brothers and sisters of mine, but found more — found you! Perhaps..." {n}The woman turns pensive and starts uncomfortably swaying from side to side.{/n} "...such was His divine will? I must take you, yes... Take you to the shelter! The elders. They will explain everything. I just have to show you the way..."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe den kurzen Strohhalm gezogen. Ich suchte Wasser und Medizin für meine Brüder und Schwestern, aber ich fand mehr — ich fand dich! Vielleicht..." {n}Die Frau wird nachdenklich und beginnt unruhig hin und her zu schwanken.{/n} "...war das sein göttlicher Wille? Ich muss dich mitnehmen, ja... Dich in den Schutzraum bringen! Zu den Ältesten. Sie werden dir alles erklären. Ich muss dir nur den Weg zeigen..."

languages.text: "J'ai tiré la courte paille. Je suis allé chercher de l'eau et des médicaments pour mes frères et sœurs, mais j'ai trouvé mieux : je t'ai trouvé toi ! Peut-être..." {n}La femme devient pensive et commence à se balancer inconfortablement d'un côté à l'autre.{/n} "...telle était Sa divine volonté ? Je dois vous emmener, oui... Vous emmener au refuge ! Les anciens. Ils vous expliqueront tout. Je n'ai qu'à vous montrer le chemin..."
languages.original_text: "I drew the short straw. Went to look for water and medicine for brothers and sisters of mine, but found more — found you! Perhaps..." {n}The woman turns pensive and starts uncomfortably swaying from side to side.{/n} "...such was His divine will? I must take you, yes... Take you to the shelter! The elders. They will explain everything. I just have to show you the way..."

traits.locale_text: "J'ai tiré la courte paille. Je suis allé chercher de l'eau et des médicaments pour mes frères et sœurs, mais j'ai trouvé mieux : je t'ai trouvé toi ! Peut-être..." {n}La femme devient pensive et commence à se balancer inconfortablement d'un côté à l'autre.{/n} "...telle était Sa divine volonté ? Je dois vous emmener, oui... Vous emmener au refuge ! Les anciens. Ils vous expliqueront tout. Je n'ai qu'à vous montrer le chemin..."

languages.text: "Saqué la pajita más corta. Fui a buscar agua y medicinas para mis hermanos y hermanas, pero encontré más: ¡te encontré a ti! Quizás..." {n}La mujer se vuelve pensativa y empieza a balancearse incómodamente de un lado a otro.{/n} "...¿tal fue su divina voluntad? Debo llevarte, sí... ¡Llevarte al refugio! A los ancianos. Ellos te lo explicarán todo. Sólo tengo que mostrarte el camino..."
languages.original_text: "I drew the short straw. Went to look for water and medicine for brothers and sisters of mine, but found more — found you! Perhaps..." {n}The woman turns pensive and starts uncomfortably swaying from side to side.{/n} "...such was His divine will? I must take you, yes... Take you to the shelter! The elders. They will explain everything. I just have to show you the way..."

traits.locale_text: "Saqué la pajita más corta. Fui a buscar agua y medicinas para mis hermanos y hermanas, pero encontré más: ¡te encontré a ti! Quizás..." {n}La mujer se vuelve pensativa y empieza a balancearse incómodamente de un lado a otro.{/n} "...¿tal fue su divina voluntad? Debo llevarte, sí... ¡Llevarte al refugio! A los ancianos. Ellos te lo explicarán todo. Sólo tengo que mostrarte el camino..."

languages.text: "Kısa çöpü ben çektim. Kardeşlerim için su ve ilaç aramaya gittim ama daha fazlasını buldum — seni buldum! Belki de..." {n}Kadın dalgınlaşır ve rahatsız bir şekilde bir o yana bir bu yana sallanmaya başlar.{/n} "...O'nun ilahi iradesi böyle miydi? Seni götürmeliyim, evet... Seni sığınağa götürmeliyim! Yaşlılar. Onlar her şeyi açıklayacaktır. Ben sadece sana yolu göstermeliyim..."
languages.original_text: "I drew the short straw. Went to look for water and medicine for brothers and sisters of mine, but found more — found you! Perhaps..." {n}The woman turns pensive and starts uncomfortably swaying from side to side.{/n} "...such was His divine will? I must take you, yes... Take you to the shelter! The elders. They will explain everything. I just have to show you the way..."
